mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, phone, nickname, gender, image, role, is_shop_owner) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{nickname}, #{gender}, #{image}, #{role}, #{isShopOwner})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, nickname, phone, image, created_at, is_shop_owner FROM users WHERE role = 'SHOP_OWNER'
SELECT user_id, username, nickname, phone, image, created_at, is_shop_owner FROM users WHERE role = 'SHOP_OWNER' order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shops (shop_name, shop_description, owner_id, contact_phone, contact_address, shop_logo, shop_banner, status, business_hours) VALUES (#{shopName}, #{shopDescription}, #{ownerId}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactAddress}, #{shopLogo}, #{shopBanner}, #{status}, #{businessHours})
mapper.select: SELECT shop_id, shop_name, shop_description, owner_id, contact_phone, contact_address, shop_logo, shop_banner, status, business_hours, rating, total_sales, created_at, updated_at, ban_reason FROM shops order by created_at desc
SELECT shop_id, shop_name, shop_description, shop_logo, shop_banner FROM shops ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT shop_id, shop_name, shop_description, shop_logo, shop_banner, status, business_hours, rating, total_sales, ban_reason FROM shops
SELECT flower_id, flower_name, price, main_image FROM flowers WHERE shop_id = #{shopId}

SELECT s.shop_id, s.shop_name, s.shop_description, s.shop_logo, s.shop_banner, s.status, s.business_hours, s.rating, s.total_sales, f.flower_id, f.flower_name, f.price, f.main_image FROM shops s LEFT JOIN flowers f ON s.shop_id = f.shop_id
SELECT shop_id, shop_name, shop_description, shop_logo, shop_banner, status, business_hours, rating, total_sales FROM shops WHERE shop_id = #{shopId}

SELECT u.nickname AS owner_name, u.phone AS owner_phone, s.shop_id, s.shop_name, s.shop_description, s.shop_logo, s.business_hours, s.status, s.contact_phone AS shop_phone, s.contact_address AS shop_address FROM shops s JOIN users u ON s.owner_id = u.user_id WHERE s.shop_id = #{shopId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE shops
shop_name = #{shopName},
shop_description = #{shopDescription},
shop_logo = #{shopLogo},
business_hours = #{businessHours},
contact_phone = #{shopPhone},
contact_address = #{shopAddress},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE shop_id = #{shopId}
UPDATE shops SET status = 0, ban_reason = null WHERE shop_id = #{shopId}

UPDATE shops
shop_name = #{shopName},
shop_logo = #{shopLogo},
business_hours = #{businessHours},
contact_phone = #{contactPhone},
contact_address = #{contactAddress},
rating = #{rating},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE shop_id = #{shopId}
